title: Implement user authentication flow
description: Set up OAuth2 login with Google and GitHub providers
raw_text: As a user, I want to log in with my Google or GitHub account so I don't need to remember another password.

title: Design dashboard homepage
description: Create wireframes and mockups for the main dashboard
raw_text: The dashboard should show key metrics, recent activity, and quick-action buttons.

title: Set up CI/CD pipeline
description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing and deployment
raw_text: Automate our build, test, and deploy process so we can ship faster.
